description_long: This is a modern, luxury bungalow with a flat roof and expansive glass windows, set within a landscaped lot featuring palm trees and manicured lawns. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, with the larger central section flanked by a smaller wing. The front facade showcases large floor-to-ceiling windows and a covered entryway, while the rear opens to a spacious patio, swimming pool, and sunbathing area. The exterior combines concrete, glass, and wood accents, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property is surrounded by a low retaining wall and includes a driveway leading to a covered garage. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and minimalist aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed luxury bungalow with large glass windows, landscaped grounds, and a pool. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a mix of concrete, glass, and wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, driveway, and landscaped lawn with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, extensive windows, and the pool area extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, sunbathing deck, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the secondary wing, additional windows, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
